name: Hal R.'s Toffee
recipeInstructions:
Triple the quantities for one cookie sheet pan.
Cook the sugar, butter, and water constantly until boiling. It will take about 25 minutes to reach a temperature of 320 degrees Fahrenheit. Remove immediately and add vanilla.
Pour over the pan covered with broken-up Plain Hershey Chocolate Bars. Add chopped pecans right away onto the sticky mixture. Cool and break into pieces.
This recipe was a later Christmas tradition, as Hal would bring this delicious toffee and have a pre-Christmas drink with us around December 24th.
